title: OPAC - Mute Claim Warnings
description: A Mod that mutes the claim chat warning messages with Xaeros Open Parties and Claims
body:
### Mute Annoying Claim Warnings!

Tired of chat spam from Open Parties and Claims every time you interact with a claimed area? This mod silences those "You can't do that here" messages.

Works on **Fabric, Quilt, and NeoForge** for all Minecraft **1.21.x** versions with a single JAR.

---

### Features

-   **Mute by Default**: Completely hides claim warning messages from your chat.
-   **Action Bar Option**: Don't want them gone completely? A simple server-side config can move the warnings to your action bar, keeping your chat clean without losing the information.

![Claim warning in the action bar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a432a62644958ccfc354787086880a4494433186.png)
---

### Server-Side Configuration

This is a **server-side** mod. The configuration is managed by the server owner in the `serverconfig` (NeoForge) or `/config` (Fabric) folder and applies to all players. No client-side setup is needed!
